title: Docker Container Lifecycle
description: Quick guides on Docker lifecycle controls, container volume bindings, network configs, and Docker Compose syntax.
codeBlock:
# Run an interactive container
docker run -it --name test-ubuntu ubuntu bash

# Stop and clean up containers
docker stop test-ubuntu
docker rm test-ubuntu
details: A Docker container goes through states like Created, Running, Paused, Stopped, and Deleted. Managing these lifecycle steps efficiently prevents orphaned resources.
